visuals.title: Five Risks of Being Unethical in AI
visuals.description: An animated diagram showing the five major risks of unethical AI: bias and discrimination, lack of transparency, manipulation and deception, job displacement, and unintended consequences, along with mitigation strategies.

diagrams.title: Five Risks of Being Unethical in AI
elements: Risk 2: Lack of Transparency and Accountability
Risk 4: Job Displacement and Economic Inequality
Risk 5: Unintended Consequences and Unforeseen Effects
